description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a rectangular footprint, clad in vertical light wood paneling on its exterior walls. The front features a large garage door and several symmetrically placed windows, while the rear opens to a fenced yard with a green lawn and a driveway leading to a decorative gate. A glass-enclosed sunroom or patio extends from the back of the house, providing a sheltered outdoor space. The roof is flat, with visible HVAC units and skylights, suggesting a contemporary architectural style. The property is surrounded by a white fence, and two cars are parked in the backyard area. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor space, and a blend of privacy and openness.
description: A modern, two-story house with light wood paneling, flat roof, and a fenced yard featuring a sunroom and driveway. The design is clean and contemporary, with symmetrical windows and a large garage door.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large garage door, and symmetrical windows on a wood-paneled facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the plain wood-paneled wall and the driveway leading to the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced green yard, glass sunroom, two parked cars, and decorative entry gate.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, fence, and the side of the sunroom extension.
attribute_entryway_design: Large garage door with adjacent standard entry door, no porch, minimal overhang, and clean modern lines
